mapper.select:
SELECT a.station_id AS stationId, a.station_name AS stationName, a.region AS region, b.train_type AS highSpeedTrain, c.train_type AS regularTrain, d.subway_line AS subwayLine
FROM stations a
LEFT JOIN high_speed_lines b ON a.station_id = b.station_id
LEFT JOIN regular_lines c ON a.station_id = c.station_id
LEFT JOIN subway_lines d ON a.station_id = d.station_id
